preamble: The transformation of a nasalized low vowel into a mid-vowel through denasalization and raising is a common step in the simplification of nasal vowel systems.

examples.note: Historic nasal [ã] merged with other vowels or denasalized in various dialects.
Systematic shift of nasalized long low vowels.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
